title: Domix's Creatures
description: A mod that focuses on adding cool creatures, structures, blocks & items
body:
![Domix's Creatures Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7ffb43e64bc7c01b87654747c4e8bd194df403.png) ![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97667c6a407865da24915c7252be40556c32ad52.png) **Domix's Creatures** is a mod that adds **45** new mobs. These range anywhere from real world animals to fully fantasy creatures. Most of the mobs have unique abilities or drops. The mod also adds **4** structures and a bunch of cool items. _(Check out the wiki for a guide on how to add your own entries to the guide book using a resource pack **[Wiki](https://github.com/DomixCZE/Fabric-DomiXs-Creatures-1.20.1/wiki)** )_ if you find any issues with the mod you can report them on my **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/3Cx2NHdpef)** ![divider2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d7de8e879a33e8ce421bac87c8b350ca9e1d2f.png) ![collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1bfd37658394a1faba8e103bfe5a04636521cbd.png) ![divider2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8d7de8e879a33e8ce421bac87c8b350ca9e1d2f.png)
List of Currently Added Mobs - **Beaver** - **Crocodile** - **Whale** - **Goldfish** - **Fire Salamander** - **Wisp** - **Spectral Bat** - **Tiger** - **Iguana** - **Deer** - **Moose** - **Eel** - **Shark** - **Mud Golem** - **Shaman** - **Vine** - **Hippo** - **Mole** - **Worm** - **Water Strider** - **Porcupine** - **Boar** - **Bison** - **Butterfly** - **Caterpillar** - **Sun Bear** - **Gorilla** - **Piranha** - **Neon Tetra** - **Peacock Bass** - **Betta Fish** - **Arapaima** - **Cheetah** - **Anglerfish** - **Freshwater Stingray** - **Hermit Crab** - **Hyena** - **Ancient Skeleton** - **Unicorn** - **Capybara** - **Raccoon** - **Catfish** - **Penguin** - **Rat** - **Carp** - **Cave Wyvern** - **Ant** - **Termite** - **Anteater** - **Owl** - **Crow** - **Pigeon** - **Komodo Dragon**
List of Currently Added Structures - **Beaver House** - **Shaman's Altar** - **Aztec Temple** - **Cave Wyvern Lair**
Frequently Asked Questions **Q:** will the mod be ported to Forge/NeoForge? **A:** A Forge/NeoForge port is currently **not** planned. --- **Q:** will the mod be ported to older versions/will the older versions of the mod recieve any new content? **A:** **No**. It would take too much time to manage multiple versions. I'd rather put that time into adding new content. --- **Q:** is the mod compatible with modded biomes? **A:** Currently, the mod supports **Biomes O' Plenty**, **Nature's Spirit**, **Terralith**, and **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** --- **Q:** Is the mod compatible with Sinytra Connector? **A:** My general stance on compatibility with Sinytra Connector is **if it works, it works.** If it doesn't, you are welcome to provide a crash report, and I can take a look, but **I cannot guarantee a fix.** ---
List of Currently Added Gamerules - enableWaterStriderRiding - enableKomodoDragonRiding - enableFireSalamanderSmelting - enableFireSalamanderMagmaAttack - enableSpectralBatScreech - enableCaterpillarTransformation - enablePorcupineQuillAttack - enableBeaverLogStripping - enableRaccoonStealing - enableRatCropBreaking - enableMoleWormDigging - enableHippoBoatAttacking - enableDeerAntlerShedding - enableTermiteLogHollowing - enableAntLeafCollecting - hermitCrabDailyTradeLimit - enableRainBreakingCrackedGlass - enableCoconutPositiveEffectRemoval - enableCoconutNegativeEffectRemoval - fluteAffectsAllTamed - enableKomodoDragonRiding - enableOwlTreasureEnchanting
Translation **The mod currently supports these languages:** - _English_ - _Czech_
License **All Rights Reserved.** The following outlines the terms of use for this mod: **You are permitted to:** * Create and distribute add-ons, resource packs, or other modifications for this mod. * Use this mod in modpacks. **You are not permitted to:** * Repost this mod on any other website or platform * Use any of the assets (models, textures, etc.) from this mod in your own projects **unless** your project is an add-on, resource pack, or other modification designed to work with this mod. If your project is unrelated to this mod, you **may not** use its assets. Attribution to the original author **(DomixCZE)** is appreciated. --- **Disclaimer:** **THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.**
